NAVAREA XIX 32/17
CSEM SURVEY FROM 30 APR BY ATLANTIC GUARDIAN-LAEU6
ANCHORED SEABED INSTRUMENTS PLACED IN AREA B0UND BY:

A.71-00.0N 018-40.0E

NOTES:
1. VESSEL REQUIRE A MINIMUM SAFETY DISTANCE OF 1.5 NM ASTERN AND HAVE VERY LIMITED MANEUVERABILITY
2. REQUEST FISHING ACTIVITIES TO STAY CLEAR AREA
